name: Re-engagement Sequence
description: 3-step sequence for contacts who went cold after initial interest

steps.subject: New value or offer
steps.description: Lead with something new — a fresh offer, insight, or relevant update

steps.subject: Different angle
steps.description: Approach from a different perspective or highlight a different benefit

steps.subject: Final re-engagement
steps.description: Last attempt — direct and honest about wanting to reconnect
